zh.Narbonne, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, França: 法國o-阿爾培斯易瑟艾納博訥
zh.Chasin, Viscaya, Pais Vasco, Spain: 西班牙艾尤斯卡迪維斯卡亞
zh.lifeSummary: 當Garcia Pires de Braganca於1155年出生在西班牙艾尤斯卡迪維斯卡亞時，他的父親Pedro Fernandes de Bragança42歲，母親Fruilhe Sanches de Barbosa30歲。他和Gontinha Soares de Tougues至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1206年在葡萄牙享年51歲。

zh-hans.Narbonne, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, França: 法国o-阿爾培斯易瑟艾納博訥
zh-hans.Chasin, Viscaya, Pais Vasco, Spain: 西班牙艾尤斯卡迪維斯卡亞
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Garcia Pires de Braganca于1155年出生在西班牙艾尤斯卡迪維斯卡亞时，他的父亲Pedro Fernandes de Bragança42岁，母亲Fruilhe Sanches de Barbosa30岁。他和Gontinha Soares de Tougues至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1206年在葡萄牙享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pires
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Antonio, Luis, Sergio, Fernando, Alberto, Carlos, Domingos, Mario, Adelino, Albino, Armindo.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Paulo, Vasco, Ilidio, Amadeu, Duarte, Lourenco.
Portuguese, Galician, and western Spanish: patronymic from the personal name Pedro, an equivalent of Peter . Compare Portuguese Peres , Spanish Perez .
English: possibly a variant of   Pierce  .

variants.name: Peter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Kurt, Otto, Ernst, Fritz, Heinz, Helmut, Horst, Kaspar, Klaus, Siegfried, Wolfgang.

English, Scottish, German, Dutch, French (Alsace and Lorraine), Czech (Moravian), Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian; Hungarian (Péter): from the personal name Peter (Greek Petros, from petra ‘rock’). The personal name was popular throughout Christian Europe in the Middle Ages, having been bestowed by Christ as a byname on the apostle Simon bar Jonah, the brother of Andrew. The name was chosen by Christ for its symbolic significance (John 1:42, Matt. 16:18); Saint Peter is regarded as the founding head of the Christian Church in view of Christ's saying, ‘Thou art Peter and upon this rock I will build my Church’. In Christian Germany in the early Middle Ages this was the most frequent personal name of non-ancient Germanic origin until the 14th century. In North America, this surname has also absorbed cognates from other languages, for example Czech Petr , Polish Piotr and Pietr, Albanian Pjetri (from the personal name Pjetër, definite form Pjetri), and also their derivatives (see examples at Peterson ). It has also been adopted as a surname by Ashkenazic Jews.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Braganca
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of Portuguese Bragança: habitational name from the city of Bragança in northern Portugal. This form of the surname is most common in India, as a result of former Portuguese colonization of the western coast of this country, and in the Philippines.

History: Braganza is an Anglicized form of the name of the royal house Bragança whose members occupied the throne of Portugal from 1640 to 1910. Before that, they exercised enormous power in the Iberian peninsula as Dukes of Braganza from 1442 onward.

nameMeanings.name: Garcia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.description: The Christian territory controlled the Kingdoms of Aragon, Navarre, and Castile.

en.lifeSummary: When Garcia Pires de Braganca was born in 1155, in Biscay, Basque Country, Spain, his father, Pedro Fernandes de Bragança, was 42 and his mother, Fruilhe Sanches de Barbosa, was 30. He had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Gontinha Soares de Tougues. He died in 1206, in Portugal, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Garcia Pires de Braganca est né en 1155, à Biscaye, Euskadi, Espagne, son père, Pedro Fernandes de Bragança, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Fruilhe Sanches de Barbosa, avait 30 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Gontinha Soares de Tougues. Il est décédé en 1206, à Portugal, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Garcia Pires de Braganca 1155 in Vizcaya, Euskadi, Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Pedro Fernandes de Bragança 42 und seine Mutter Fruilhe Sanches de Barbosa 30. Er hatte mit Gontinha Soares de Tougues mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1206 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Portugal.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Garcia Pires de Braganca è nato il nel 1155 nel Vizcaya, Euskadi, Spagna, il suo padre, Pedro Fernandes de Bragança, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Fruilhe Sanches de Barbosa, aveva 30 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Gontinha Soares de Tougues. Morì nel 1206, nel Portogallo, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.Narbonne, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, França: フランスルhoネ-アルペスイスeアナルボン
ja.Chasin, Viscaya, Pais Vasco, Spain: スペインエウスカジーヴィズケヤ
ja.lifeSummary: Garcia Pires de Bragancaが1155年にスペインエウスカジーヴィズケヤで生まれた時，父Pedro Fernandes de Bragançaは42歳，母Fruilhe Sanches de Barbosaは30歳であった。彼はGontinha Soares de Touguesとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1206年にポルトガルで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Garcia Pires de Braganca(이)가 1155년 스페인 우스카디 비즈카야에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Pedro Fernandes de Bragança(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Fruilhe Sanches de Barbosa(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Gontinha Soares de Tougues(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1206년 포르투갈에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Garcia Pires de Braganca nasceu em 1155, em Biscaia, Euskadi, Espanha, seu pai, Pedro Fernandes de Bragança, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Fruilhe Sanches de Barbosa, tinha 30 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Gontinha Soares de Tougues. Ele faleceu em 1206, em Portugal, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Garcia Pires de Braganca родился в 1155 г. в местности визкеия, эускади, Испания, его отцу по имени Pedro Fernandes de Bragança было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Fruilhe Sanches de Barbosa, 30. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Gontinha Soares de Tougues. Он умер в 1206 г. в местности Португалия в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Garcia Pires de Braganca nació en 1155, en Vizcaya, País Vasco, España, su papá, Pedro Fernandes de Bragança, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Fruilhe Sanches de Barbosa, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Gontinha Soares de Tougues. Murió en 1206, en Portugal, a la edad de 51 años.
